summary: Document Management Feature - All Tests Passed. Backend API (16/16 tests passed) for document upload and CRUD operations. Frontend Admin Documents page fully functional with file upload, edit, delete, and drag-drop reordering. Public Constitution page displays documents correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/upload/document - Upload PDF returns 200 with filename, url, size
POST /api/upload/document - Upload DOC returns 200
POST /api/upload/document - Upload DOCX returns 200
POST /api/upload/document - Reject TXT file with 400
POST /api/upload/document - Reject PNG image with 400
POST /api/upload/document - Reject EXE file with 400
GET /api/documents - Returns list of documents ordered by order field
POST /api/documents - Creates new document with auto-order
POST /api/documents - Document persists and can be retrieved
PUT /api/documents/{id} - Updates document title successfully
PUT /api/documents/{invalid_id} - Returns 404 for non-existent document
DELETE /api/documents/{id} - Deletes document successfully
DELETE /api/documents/{invalid_id} - Returns 404 for non-existent document
PUT /api/documents/reorder - Reorders documents correctly
PUT /api/documents/reorder - Handles empty list gracefully
Documents returned in correct order by order field
Admin Documents page loads with Add Document button
Add Document modal opens with file upload and title input
File upload accepts PDF, DOC, DOCX files
Document creation works and document appears in list
Document edit modal opens with existing data
Document title update works correctly
Document delete works with confirmation dialog
Drag and drop reordering works with success toast
Documents appear on public Constitution page (/constitution)
Download button available on public page
Empty state shows 'No documents available' message
critical_code_review_comments: AdminLogin.jsx missing data-testid attributes on form inputs - should add for better testability
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - all test documents cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Document management feature fully implemented and tested. Backend API at POST /api/upload/document accepts PDF/DOC/DOCX files (max 50MB), stores in /app/backend/uploads/. Document CRUD via /api/documents endpoints with reorder support via PUT /api/documents/reorder. Admin Documents page at /admin/documents with file upload, edit, delete, and drag-drop reordering. Public Constitution page at /constitution displays documents fetched from API.
